rules.title: User Registration and De-registration
rules.description: A formal user registration and de-registration process shall be implemented
rules.remediation: Implement formal user lifecycle management including registration, authentication, and de-registration procedures.

rules.title: Information Access Restriction
rules.description: Access to information and application system functions shall be restricted
rules.remediation: Implement role-based access control with principle of least privilege. Document access control policies.

rules.title: Cryptographic Controls Policy
rules.description: A policy on the use of cryptographic controls shall be developed and implemented
rules.remediation: Develop and implement cryptographic policy. Use approved algorithms (AES-256, RSA-2048+). Implement key management.

rules.title: Event Logging
rules.description: Event logs recording user activities, exceptions, and security events shall be produced and kept
rules.remediation: Implement comprehensive event logging. Include timestamps, user IDs, event types, and outcomes. Protect log integrity.

rules.title: Management of Technical Vulnerabilities
rules.description: Information about technical vulnerabilities shall be obtained in a timely fashion
rules.remediation: Implement automated vulnerability scanning. Use Dependabot or similar tools. Establish patch management process.

rules.title: Secure Development Policy
rules.description: Rules for the development of software and systems shall be established and applied
rules.remediation: Document secure development lifecycle. Implement code review, security testing, and change management procedures.
